meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Google Pixel repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Google Pixel Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Professional Google Pixel repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, battery, charging port repair for Pixel 9, 8, 7, 6, Fold & all models. Same-day service available.
page.h1: Google Pixel Repair Experts in Winnipeg, MB
page.heroDescription: From the latest Pixel 9 Pro to Pixel Fold devices, we specialize in Google's flagship phone repairs. Cracked OLED screens, degraded batteries, camera issues, and charging problems—all fixed with quality parts and backed by our repair warranty.

heroImage.alt: Google Pixel repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Pixel OLED and LTPO display replacements. Smooth 120Hz scrolling restored for Pixel 7 Pro, 8 Pro, and 9 Pro models.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Pixel batteries degrade after 2-3 years. Same-day replacement to restore all-day Adaptive Battery life.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: USB-C port repair for all Pixel phones. Fix charging issues, loose connections, and data transfer problems.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Restore Pixel's renowned computational photography. Rear camera, ultrawide, telephoto, and front camera repairs.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix muffled audio, crackling speakers, or dead earpieces.

services.name: Fingerprint Sensor
services.description: Under-display fingerprint sensor not working? We repair and calibrate optical sensors on Pixel 6 and newer.

advantage_pillars.title: Pure Android Experts
advantage_pillars.description: We understand Pixel's unique hardware and software integration. Tensor chip diagnostics and repair expertise.

advantage_pillars.title: Same-Day Pixel Repairs
advantage_pillars.description: Most Pixel screen and battery repairs completed within 2 hours. Walk-ins welcome at both locations.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

advantage_pillars.title: Transparent Pricing
advantage_pillars.description: Free diagnostics and upfront quotes. No surprises—know your Pixel repair cost before we start.

model_categories.title: Pixel Fold & Legacy
model_categories.description: Foldable specialists plus continued support for older Pixel generations.

models_description: We service all Google Pixel generations from the newest Pixel 9 series to legacy Pixel 3 devices.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Pixel repair costs are driven by parts availability and quality—Google uses premium OLED displays. Google's Pixel phone help center covers troubleshooting steps.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Many customers are surprised that Pixel screens can cost as much as or more than iPhone screens. iFixit's Pixel teardowns show that Google has improved repairability in recent generations.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost approaches the value of your Pixel, we'll explain your options clearly before proceeding.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make financial sense, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: How long does Google Pixel screen replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most Pixel screen replacements are completed within 1-2 hours. Pixel Fold and Pixel 9 Pro Fold devices may require 2-4 hours due to their complex folding display assemblies.

faqs.question: Do you repair Pixel Fold devices?
faqs.answer: Yes! We specialize in Pixel Fold and Pixel 9 Pro Fold repairs including inner screen, outer screen, hinge mechanism, and flex cable issues.

faqs.question: Will my Pixel still receive software updates after repair?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Your Pixel will continue receiving all Google software updates, security patches, and Pixel Feature Drops after our repair.

faqs.question: How much does Pixel repair cost in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Costs vary by model and repair type. Pixel a-series repairs are typically more affordable, while Pro models and Fold devices cost more due to premium components.

faqs.question: Do Pixel repairs affect camera quality or AI features?
faqs.answer: No. Our repairs don't affect your Pixel's computational photography, Magic Eraser, or other AI features.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
